description: A technician discovers that the wrong part was delivered for a scheduled repair, delaying the job.

nodes.task_description: Identify the incorrect part received and the correct part number from the repair order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the wrong part was sent and identifies the correct part needed.

nodes.task_description: Contact the parts department to arrange an emergency order for the correct part.

expected_outcome.value: Agent places a 'STAT' order for the correct part.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to inform them of the delay and provide a new estimated completion time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent proactively calls the customer to manage their expectations about the delay.
